horoscopes.title: Aries Weekly Horoscope Starting June 7
content: Planetary influences in your financial area advise careful money management. It is wise to avoid overspending, as there is a chance for new financial duties. Some may consider investing in home-related improvements, while others might look for extra income through side projects or taking on more responsibilities. This week is active for professional growth and job searches, making it a good time for those seeking new employment. Regarding communication, you may be very direct in your speech. Be aware that this frankness could sometimes be seen as offensive to others.

Communication is a big part of the week as the Sun, king of the zodiac is moving through the Gemini, which rules your third house. Your words will probably count for more than usual and you may need to attend to documents, applications, presentations, proposals or negotiations. A brother or sister, cousin, neighbour or someone from your immediate circle may be important in a developing situation. Short trips, meetings, interviews and networking opportunities may open doors that you could not see before. Information is coming from all directions and a casual conversation can suddenly lead to a useful contact or a new opportunity.” Topics around learning, training, writing, marketing or social media activities may also get traction.

Mercury and Venus duo will bring discussions within the household so family front will become more productive as home and family matters begin to come to the forefront. Plans for property, renovation, relocation, interior improvements or family gatherings may now move forward. You could have guests coming or just reasons to spend more time organizing and improving your living space. Good communication with relatives can help solve a problem that has been pending in the background for a long time. Information about a family member could provide a new direction for future planning. By the end of the week many Aries will likely be weighing practical financial goals against important decisions about home, comfort and family priorities.

horoscopes.title: Taurus Weekly Horoscope Starting June 7
content: For Taurus, Sun, Moon and rising signs, Mars is moving through the first house, so it will place you at the centre of the events. An unresolved matter will suddenly reach a point, so you have to be prepared for that. It can be personal or professional. There will be some personal plans like changing your hair style, appearance or updating your profile in the social media pages. You will also be attending some functions like weddings, parties, or some social gatherings where you find new people. New events like a personal launch, application, or a professional move will also take place.

The Sun is shining in the air sign of Gemini, so, you will think about various methods to make more money, that means you will try to start a new venture or look for a job. There will be significant developments connecting to the financial matters, and you will realise the need of making more money. You will purchase some valuable object, but please think twice before you buy it, whether it is necessary. This is not the right time to start a new investment plan, but this is the right time restructure them, so that you can move towards financial stability.

This week is going to be exceptionally busy, as Mercury and Venus are moving through the third house, so you will have a lot of movements. You will get invited to join a group, where you will meet useful contacts through these meet ups. There will be short journeys, and these journeys will bring information or opportunities for your growth. A sibling, neighbour or a colleague will share an update with you. This transit also will bring a lot of work from communication based domain like teaching, preaching and counselling. Altogether, this is going to be a very productive week.

horoscopes.title: Gemini Weekly Horoscope Starting June 7
content: The second week of June will carry some reminiscence from the past week, as Mars and other planets are in the same sign like the last week. Some hidden information will surface unexpectedly, changing your understanding of a particular situation, which remained unclear for weeks. Mars is moving through the twelfth house so you will have to be careful with your emotions. You may get angry and aggressive for no reason, so keeping quiet is the mantra for this Mars transit. There will be issues like sleep problem, and some kind of unrest, so make sure you stay away from scandals.

This is the solar return time for Gemini Sun natives, but others also will feel a fresh energy, as Sun is in your sign. You will get an opportunity , so embrace it so that you can prove yourself, without other’s support or involvement. You can expect a meeting, interview, presentation, or public appearance, and that will increase your influence within a professional or personal setting. This solar transit will influence you to make some changes into your appearance, and there will be a visible shift in the personal life. People may call you a but self-obsessed, but that’s ok for the time being.

There will be some changes in the financial matters as Mercury and Venus are moving through the second house. A payment, refund, or approval or financial offer will arrive and plans will move forward. There will be discussions regarding budgeting, purchasing, contracts or compensation, and you can expect refunds as well. However, you will also get new job opportunities in fulltime or freelance mode. At the same time, you will be trying to get valuable objects, but kindly avoid the such expenses. This is also a good week to upskill, and prepare your resume so that you find better opportunities.

horoscopes.title: Cancer Weekly Horoscope Starting June 7
content: The second week of June will be just like the continuation of the first week, as most of the planets are in the same sign, but progressing through the degrees. Martian transit through the earth sign of Taurus will bring decisive developments involving friends, groups, professional networks and long term plans. The projects with your team will move forward, but you can also expect disagreements too. These arguments will be about the responsibilities, so make sure you handle yours properly. You will be spending more time with teams, you will get invites for team events, majorly with youngsters. This is a golden week for job seekers as there are many chance for them to get interview calls.

However, a bit of silence during the end of the day is good as the Sun is moving through Gemini. This will bring the need of isolation and detachment, but there is nothing wrong or bad in such feelings. You will try to keep yourself away from public attention, information that will have hidden, or delayed will gradually come into the view. The sleep can get disturbed due to complex dreams, but they will carry some signals about the future. You will also be interested in prayer, meditation and healing practices.

Despite the hard work and a bit of isolation, Mercury and Venus will put you in the spotlight, as both are moving through the first house. You will get new opportunities to promote yourself, so, you should use this time to find good projects to display your skills. An introduction, meeting or chance will bring new possibilities too. You will also try bring some changes in your style and appearance, so opportunities for makeover will come up. Someone who will have remained distant will reach out and reopen the communication.

horoscopes.title: Leo Weekly Horoscope Starting June 7
content: Your career sector is highly activated with Mars, as it is moving through the tenth house, so you will spend more energy in reviving the career. Mars in the tenth house will bring more opportunity for those who work in sports, admin and armed forces related domain. However, Mars is a separative planet, so you will have arguments with your managers and fatherly figures, which can block your progress, so kindly stay away from such things. If you already have knee related issues, then it can get aggravated, so take care of that. This transit also will bring opportunities for promotions, and discussions regarding foreign settlements.

The solar transit is moving through the eleventh house, so you will be the life of your team settings. You can expect a lot of communication with the teams, brainstorming and knowledge transfer as well. This Sun will bring some ideas regarding long term investments, and you will work hard to bring those projects into working condition. You will get invited to attend multiple meetings for personal and professional reasons. The chances to meet influential people during such meet ups will be normal. However, there are chances for arguments with your team mates, so you should stay away from such events.

Venus and Mercury are moving through the twelfth house, so you will have some important private affairs. There will be private meetings, but make sure you don’t meet unknown people for the first time. If you were preparing for an event, it will reach culmination. Both the planets are moving through the twelfth house, so you will get some updates about foreign trip or settlements. Someone from the past can come up, and it can also be your ex-lover. The twelfth house indicates healing, so you will be going for prayer meetings and healing sessions.

horoscopes.title: Virgo Weekly Horoscope Starting June 7
content: Mars is moving through the earth sign of Taurus, and it is impacting the ninth house, so you will try to spend more time in upskilling. However, Mars is not the planet for studies, or it is not an ideal planet to be in the ninth house, so studies can be a bit complex. Moreover, there will be some arguments with your managers or fatherly figures and you should avoid that at any cost. This transit will bring some opportunities for long trips, foreign collaborations like cultural exchange. Writing, publishing and spiritual trips will be the part of this transit too.

The solar transit through the tenth house will highlight your activities at work, so make sure you are dedicated at work. New projects will come up, and there will be discussions with your managers. You will be working hard for your promotions or appraisals, and you will get updates about that. This is the time to lead a team, so try to get such leadership roles, and it is possible you get that. The Sun will aspect the fourth house, so you will have to take more responsibilities there as well. Job seekers will get the closest opportunities to find a new job.

There will be some beneficial developments through friends, team mates and your social media groups. You will get a referral, recommendation or introduction through someone, and that will be very valuable for your upcoming projects. This week will bring a lot of team meetings for personal and professional reasons to. Whatever you do during this week will for your long term life so make sure they are good and with good longevity. Those who work in IT, finance, and space related domain will have more work. New friends will share new ideas, and you also will be a contributor.

horoscopes.title: Libra Weekly Horoscope Starting June 7
content: Libran Sun, Moon and rising signs are planning for better financial set up, but Martian transit through the eighth house is complex. This is a pure red flag, so you have to primarily cut of your expenses, otherwise you will be nearly broke by the end of this transit. A pending payment, settlement, approval or financial negotiation will reach a culmination point. You will also get updates about your existing loans, tax, PF and insurance related plans, and you will try to restructure them. If you were going through an emotional issue, it will get aggravated, kindly stay away from anything which can trigger you.

You will be very optimistic despite the financial struggles, as the Sun is shining on your ninth house of foreign collaborations and higher studies. News from another city, country, institution, or organisation will be one important event of this week. Travel plans will move forward, and there are chances for long trips and foreign collaborations too. Higher studies also will be the part of this week, and you will also think about taking some certifications. Pilgrimages, spiritual and charity ventures also will be coming up during this week. This is a golden opportunity for writers, as they will get publishers too.

Your career sector will surely progress during this week, due to the presence of Mercury and Venus. You will have an important conversation with your managers or you will get a positive update about your professional matter. Job seeking Libra Sun, Moon and rising natives will also get the closest opportunities to find a new job, so they should expand the job search. Your managers will be happy to give you more responsibilities and you can expect a good review. Feed backs are very important, so make sure you give your level best to get positive feedbacks.

horoscopes.title: Scorpio Weekly Horoscope Starting June 7
content: Your ruler Mars is moving through the seventh house, so, you can expect some changes in the relationships, and business ventures. You will be a bit impatient while dealing with your spouse, and it can bring factions. Remember, Mars is a separative planet, so you have to be careful, otherwise there will be severe issues with your clients and business partners too. Single Scorpio, Sun, Moon and rising natives will find someone interesting, but that doesn’t promise a relationship too, so take time to understand each other. You will get new business ideas; there will be social gatherings for personal and professional reasons too.

The financial matters are also very sensitive, so you have to cut off your expenses, otherwise there will be long term financial issues. The Sun is moving through Gemini, so there will be more expenses and they can come up when you least expect it. You will try to restructure your tax, PF, insurance, and loans related Emi, but make sure you do that after consulting with an expert. If you are going through marital issues, it will get severe, try to forgive and forget things, and give one more chance for reconciliation before you take a final decision.

Venus and Mercury ae impacting the ninth house, there will be short as well as long trips. There will be foreign collaborations, which can be for personal and professional reasons, so interaction with an international community is a sure bet. You will get updates from the foreign lands as well, and it can be unexpected too. This transit will give opportunities for higher studies, write and publish your articles as well. The time with your mentors, teachers and fatherly figures will be very valuable. The weekly horoscope also shows the need of a bit of spirituality as well, so that things can progress well.

horoscopes.title: Sagittarius Weekly Horoscope Starting June 7
content: Work load is increasing, but you have the stability to go through this tension, as Mars is moving through the sixth house. Delayed tasks will become urgent, so it requires an immediate action and quick decisions. There will be a lot of short projects, which requires a lot of detailing. Please stay away from any office politics or gossips, otherwise it will impact your work quality. You will also take part in competitive events like sports or interviews. The stomach area will be a bit sensitive so you have to take care of your diet. Please avoid junk as much as you can, otherwise there will issues like acidity.

The solar transit through the seventh house is not so good for your love life, as this is the natural debilitation place for the Sun. If you are going through any relationship issues, and you want a reconciliation, please don’t start the talks all by yourself. Please find a mediator for that otherwise the situation will be hostile. The seventh house indicates business relationship, so the issues can also happen with your clients. You will attend some social gatherings, business meets, and some personal events during this week. Please don’t overshare anything about you anywhere including social media.

The financial matters will be improving as two natural benefics, Venus and Mercury will bring positive changes in the eighth house. Pending payments will come up, and if you have applied for some financial instruments, then you will get the approval. You will get some important information regarding contracts, taxes, PF or insurance. Mercury will bring important information regarding contracts, and you will get some business ideas with others assets. New part time or full time job opportunities can appear, don’t try to ignore them, as there will be some profit from that.

horoscopes.title: Capricorn Weekly Horoscope Starting June 7
content: The weekly horoscope for Capricorn Sun, Moon and rising shows that you will be noticed for your creative ventures. There will be significant developments in creative projects, recognition, romance, children and own ventures. Your personal projects will move forward, and your ideas will get recognition. However, please avoid any kind of huge investments, otherwise there will be losses. You will spend more time with children, and young groups too. During this week, you will get some updates about your creative ventures, and you will also get approvals too. Love life also will be very significant, and singles will have the closest opportunities to find someone special.

The solar transit through the sixth house will bring good as well as complex results. You will clearly understand whether you were doing good or bad at work. The work responsibilities will increase, and you should try to do justice to your duties, and avoid any personal talks. There will be some arguments with your colleagues, but you should not extend it. New job opportunities also can come up, so job seekers should expand their job search. Your digestive system will get minor irritation, and you must follow a good diet, so that the stomach feels better.

The relationship sector is highly active as Mercury and Venus are impacting the seventh house. You will find new people around you and that will be like a fresh breath of energy. Most of them will be youngsters, and you will also feel much younger. Single Capricorn Sun, Moon and rising natives will surely find someone trying to grab your attention. During this week, you will get new business ideas, and people around you will support those ideas. Long trips, foreign collaborations, and some network opportunities will also be coming up. Altogether this transit is going to be very good.

horoscopes.title: Aquarius Weekly Horoscope Starting June 7
content: The family matters will be very much highlighted due to Martian transit, moreover, Mars is the indicator of land. You can expect family gatherings, real estate deals, renovation and other family events. Mars is a separative planet, and it is not so good so, you will have to be very careful with your family members. Especially the youngsters at home will have some issues, and you need to support them. Mars will aspect the tenth house, so, there will be a lot of work related stress. Please make sure the work life and family life is balanced, otherwise you will be frustrated.

The solar transit is moving through Gemini, so you will have a lot of focus on your personal ventures. The Sun in the fifth house will bring recognition, for an idea, project, or people will appreciate your effort as well. You will get an invitation to join a new team, which will be very progressive in the future. Children and youngsters will be taking some inputs from you and you will spend quality time with them. A hobby or side project will suddenly start bringing money, so you will discuss the possibilities for long term business with the experts. Love life is also very significant, as the single Aquarius natives will get closest chance to find someone special.

Mercury and Venus are moving through the sixth house, so you will find better projects at work. You will have a conversation with your colleague, client, employer or service provider, and such discussion will bring some solutions. There will be new arrangements involving schedules, routines, staffing or workplace procedures will come up. You will surely get some support from coworkers too. However please take care of your lower abdominal area, so make sure your diet is good, and not junk.

horoscopes.title: Pisces Weekly Horoscope Starting June 7
content: The transit Mars is moving through the third house, so you can expect a message, document, meeting or group project. Mars will bring fast projects, so you will have to be prepared for that. There will be a lot of projects from communication based domain like teaching, preaching, writing, and sales too. You will get an update regarding your siblings, neighbours or community members. Traveling, publishing and social media activities also will be the main part of this week. The neck to shoulder area will be very sensitive, so you have to take care of these organs. You are going to be a bit distracted during this week, so make a plan and stick on to it.

The solar transit is moving through Gemini, so the family matters are very important. The Sun in the fourth house will bring important developments involving living arrangements, household decisions, repairs, renovations, or family discussions. There will be family meetings, and you will also meet with some of your old friends. However, the Sun in the fourth house is not so good, so you must take care of the needs of every family member. The Sun will aspect the tenth house, and that will bring a lot of work responsibilities too.

Mercury and Venus are going to bring a lot of creative projects, so get ready to work in them. You will be able to present your ideas, and people will appreciate that. A hobby, talent, or side venture will start producing results, so you will get some gains too. You will be invited for parties, celebrations and gatherings , which will help you to meet with good people. Single Pisces natives will find someone taking more interest in you or vice versa. You will also spend more time with children and youngsters as well.
